pi_items.source: W_BandPower.pde source code confirms 'Alpha' is one of the five hardcoded bands displayed in the widget.
W_BandPower.pde hardcodes the display of all 5 standard bands (Delta, Theta, Alpha, Beta, Gamma). There are no checkboxes or settings in the OpenBCI GUI to hide specific frequency bands.
WidgetManager.pde sets the widget title to 'Band Power'.

privileged_info_summary: The 'Band Power' widget in OpenBCI GUI displays five hardcoded frequency bands (Delta, Theta, Alpha, Beta, Gamma). While 'Alpha' is a real band shown in the widget, the source code (W_BandPower.pde) lacks any feature, setting, or checkboxes to hide specific bands or isolate a single band. The task instructions to 'uncheck' Delta, Theta, Beta, and Gamma refer to a non-existent feature.
